cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.description: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties.

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: We collect minimal data necessary to improve our services: email addresses when you subscribe to our newsletter, and anonymous usage analytics when you consent to cookies. We do not collect sensitive personal information.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use a single analytics service (PostHog) to understand how visitors use our site. This cookie is only set after you explicitly consent via our cookie banner. No cookies are set if you decline.
privacy.analyticsDesc: When you accept analytics cookies, we collect anonymous page view data, session duration, and general device information. This data helps us understand which content is most useful and improve site performance. No data is shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can withdraw cookie consent by clearing your browser's local storage. For newsletter subscribers, every email includes an unsubscribe link.
privacy.contactDesc: For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us at updates@helva.group.

terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms governing your use of our website and services.
terms.useDesc: By accessing this website, you agree to use it in good faith and in compliance with applicable laws. You may not use our services for any unlawful purpose or in a way that could damage, disable, or impair the site.
terms.ipDesc: All content on this site — including text, graphics, logos, and design — is the property of Helva Group and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.
terms.liabilityDesc: Helva Group provides this website and its content on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of our services.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. Material changes will be communicated via our website.

about.label: Brand Story
about.title: Helva
about.intro: The modern world doesn't need more noise — it needs better systems.
about.challengeP1: Everything we build today is fragmented. Tools don't talk to each other. Brands feel inconsistent. Learning, health, work, and creativity live in separate boxes.
about.challengeP2: People end up stitching their lives together with hacks, tabs, and half-finished plans.
about.challengeHighlight: Helva exists to bring it back to whole.
about.completenessDesc: In Swedish it echoes hel — the feeling of something finished, balanced, and complete.
about.warmthDesc: In Sorani Kurdish it nods to halva — something made with care and shared in meaningful moments.
about.shareabilityDesc: In English, it stays clean and open — a word we get to define through what we make.
about.buildP1: We are building a family of products and services designed to feel like they belong together: beautifully crafted, deeply practical, and quietly powerful.
about.buildP2: Whether it's fitness, language learning, design systems, or digital operations — Helva is about making things that reduce friction and increase momentum.
about.detailsDesc: We obsess over details because small details create trust.
about.clarityDesc: We design for clarity because clarity creates action.
about.longevityDesc: We build for longevity because the best products don't just launch — they last.
about.quote: Helva is a modern foundation: warm enough to feel human, structured enough to scale.
about.quoteFollow: We don't chase trends. We build things that make life feel simpler, cleaner, and more complete.

projects.label: Our Work
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A family of products designed to feel like they belong together — beautifully crafted, deeply practical, and quietly powerful.

solutions.label: What We Offer
solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Tailored approaches for different stages and scales. From founding teams to established enterprises.
solutions.forStartupsDesc: Launch faster with foundational systems. Design infrastructure, operational frameworks, and scalable architecture from day one.
solutions.forEnterprisesDesc: Modernize legacy systems without disruption. Phased migration, unified design language, and seamless integration.
solutions.forAgenciesDesc: White-label solutions and partnership frameworks. Extend your capabilities with our expertise and infrastructure.
solutions.discoveryDesc: We start by understanding your world — your challenges, your users, your vision. No assumptions, just listening.
solutions.architectureDesc: We design systems, not just screens. Every decision considers scale, maintenance, and long-term evolution.
solutions.executionDesc: We build with precision and care. Regular checkpoints, transparent progress, and quality at every step.
solutions.evolutionDesc: Launch is just the beginning. We partner for the long term, iterating and improving as you grow.
solutions.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss how we can help you create systems that last.

ai.label: Intelligence Layer
ai.title: AI
ai.subtitle: Artificial intelligence that feels natural. We integrate AI thoughtfully across our products — not as a gimmick, but as genuine capability.
ai.intelligentAutomationDesc: Automate repetitive workflows while maintaining quality and consistency. From content generation to data processing.
ai.personalizationEnginesDesc: Dynamic experiences that adapt to individual users. Learning systems that get smarter with every interaction.
ai.naturalLanguageDesc: Conversational interfaces and text analysis. Making human-computer interaction feel natural and intuitive.
ai.predictiveAnalyticsDesc: Turn data into foresight. Pattern recognition and forecasting that helps you make better decisions.
ai.philosophyP1: The best AI is invisible. It doesn't demand attention — it simply makes everything work better.
ai.philosophyP2: We don't add AI to check a box. We integrate it where it genuinely improves the experience, and we leave it out where it doesn't.
ai.humanCenteredDesc: AI should augment human capability, not replace human judgment. We build tools that empower, not automate away.
ai.transparentDesc: No black boxes. We believe in explainable AI that users can understand, trust, and control.
ai.ethicalDesc: Privacy by design, bias awareness, and responsible deployment. Technology that serves everyone fairly.
ai.integratingDesc: AI capabilities are being woven into Pulse, Lingua, and Nexus — our upcoming product family.

newsletter.subtitle: Thoughtful updates on systems, products, and ideas built to last.

forma.title: Forma
forma.description: A comprehensive design system built for scale. Unified components, tokens, and patterns that bring consistency across all Helva products.
forma.heroTagline: One system. Every product. Total consistency.
forma.problem: As Helva's product family grew, each team developed its own component library and visual language. The result was fragmented user experiences, duplicated engineering effort, and a brand that felt inconsistent across touchpoints. Designers spent more time recreating components than solving real problems.
forma.solution: We built Forma -- a living design system with a shared token architecture, a versioned component library, and documentation that bridges design and engineering. Every color, spacing value, and interaction pattern flows from a single source of truth. Teams adopt Forma incrementally, and contributions feed back into the system.
forma.outcome: Forma now powers every Helva product. Design-to-development handoff time dropped dramatically, and new features ship with pixel-perfect brand consistency from day one. The system has become a competitive advantage -- new products launch faster because the foundations are already in place.
forma.testimonialQuote: Forma changed how we think about building products. We stopped arguing about button styles and started solving real user problems.

pulse.title: Pulse
pulse.description: Intelligent fitness tracking that adapts to your rhythm. Personalized programs, progress insights, and seamless integration with your daily life.
pulse.problem: Most fitness apps treat users as data points -- generic programs, overwhelming metrics, and no understanding of real-life constraints. People start motivated but disengage within weeks because the experience doesn't adapt to their changing schedules, energy levels, or goals.
pulse.solution: Pulse uses adaptive algorithms to build fitness programs around your actual life. It learns from your activity patterns, adjusts difficulty based on recovery signals, and integrates with calendar data to suggest optimal workout windows. The interface strips away noise -- you see only what matters for today.
pulse.outcome: Early beta users show significantly higher retention compared to traditional fitness apps. The adaptive scheduling feature alone accounts for a major increase in weekly workout completion. Pulse is on track for public launch in Q3 2025.
pulse.testimonialQuote: It's the first app that actually understands I have a life outside the gym. The suggestions feel human, not algorithmic.

lingua.title: Lingua
lingua.description: Language learning reimagined. Contextual immersion, spaced repetition, and real-world application combined into one cohesive experience.
lingua.problem: Traditional language apps gamify vocabulary memorization but fail at producing confident speakers. Learners accumulate streaks without being able to hold a basic conversation. The gap between knowing words and using them in context remains enormous.
lingua.solution: Lingua builds language skills through contextual immersion. Instead of isolated flashcards, learners engage with real-world scenarios -- ordering at a cafe, navigating a city, discussing work projects. Spaced repetition is woven into narrative arcs so review feels natural, not repetitive. AI-powered conversation partners adapt to your proficiency in real time.
lingua.outcome: Internal testing shows learners reach conversational proficiency in roughly half the time compared to traditional methods. The contextual approach produces higher confidence scores and lower dropout rates. Lingua is currently in closed alpha with an initial focus on Swedish and Kurdish (Sorani).

nexus.title: Nexus
nexus.description: Digital operations infrastructure for growing teams. Workflow automation, knowledge management, and seamless collaboration tools.
nexus.heroTagline: Operations infrastructure that scales with you.
nexus.problem: Growing teams drown in tooling fragmentation. Knowledge lives in scattered documents, workflows depend on tribal memory, and collaboration requires constant context-switching between platforms. The operational overhead of scaling becomes the bottleneck, not the work itself.
nexus.solution: Nexus unifies workflow automation, knowledge management, and team collaboration into a single platform. It connects to existing tools rather than replacing them, creating an operational layer that captures institutional knowledge and automates recurring processes. The design philosophy is radical simplicity -- powerful features surfaced only when needed.
nexus.outcome: Nexus is in the architectural planning phase, with a design sprint scheduled for Q2 2025. Early research interviews with 30+ teams have validated the core thesis: the biggest productivity drain for scaling teams is not missing features -- it is missing connections between existing ones.
